CustomField.formula: IF(NOT(ISBLANK(sugati__S_O_Total_Agent_Commission_Due_Booking__c)), sugati__S_O_Total_Agent_Commission_Due_Booking__c, IF( $Setup.sugati__Site__c.sugati__Agency_is_End_Customer__c, sugati__S_O_Total_Agent_Commission_Rolled_up__c, IF( (!ISBLANK(sugati__O_Agent_Commission_Amount__c) && ISBLANK(sugati__O_Agent_Commission_percent__c)), sugati__O_Agent_Commission_Amount__c, IF( (!ISBLANK(sugati__O_Agent_Commission_percent__c) && ISBLANK(sugati__O_Agent_Commission_Amount__c)), IF( ISPICKVAL(sugati__O_Agent_Commission_Type__c , 'Margin'), ((sugati__O_Agent_Commission_percent__c/100)* sugati__O_Margin__c ), ((sugati__O_Agent_Commission_percent__c/100)*Amount)), IF( (ISBLANK(sugati__O_Agent_Commission_Amount__c) && ISBLANK(sugati__O_Agent_Commission_percent__c)), IF( !ISBLANK(sugati__O_Agent__r.sugati__S_Commission_Value__c), sugati__O_Agent__r.sugati__S_Commission_Value__c, IF( !ISBLANK(sugati__O_Agent__r.sugati__S_Commission_Value__c), sugati__O_Agent__r.sugati__S_Commission_Value__c, IF( ISPICKVAL(sugati__O_Agent_Commission_Type__c , 'Margin'), ((sugati__O_Agent__r.sugati__S_Commission__c)* sugati__O_Margin__c ), ((sugati__O_Agent__r.sugati__S_Commission__c)*Amount)) ) ), null ) ) ) ) )
CustomField.label: Agent Commission
